signup.step1Description: Sign up with your email and a 6-digit PIN.
signup.emailHint: A 6-digit verification code will be sent to this address.
signup.step2Description: We sent a 6-digit code to {{email}}. Enter it below to activate your account.
signup.resendHint: If you did not receive the email, you can send the verification code again.
signup.resendSent: We sent a fresh verification code. Please check your spam folder too.
signup.step3Description: Your account is ready. You can now log in.

resetPin.requestDescription: Enter your registered email. We will send a verification code to reset your PIN.
resetPin.confirmDescription: We sent a 6-digit code to {{email}}. Enter it and set a new 6-digit PIN.
